summary: Completed backend testing for Admin Panel endpoints. All 19 tests passed. Verified: system stats, customer list with pagination/search, customer detail, admin list, make/remove admin, grant access (trial/forever_free), referrals list, referral fix validation, create admin, non-admin 403 access, and primary admin configuration.

minor.issue: Filter returns 0 results even when non-admin users exist. MongoDB query looks for is_admin:false but most users don't have the is_admin field at all (only set when becoming admin). Fix: Use {"$ne": True} or {"$in": [false, null]} instead of false.

action_items: OPTIONAL: Fix is_admin=false filter in /app/backend/routers/admin.py line 137-138 to use {"$ne": True} instead of False
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin panel backend fully tested. All endpoints working correctly. Minor bug found in is_admin=false filter (returns 0 results due to MongoDB field existence issue). Primary admin contact@trustoffice.app exists with is_admin=true and forever_free subscription.

endpoints_tested.GET /api/admin/stats: PASS - Returns system statistics (52 users, 1 admin, 32 trusts)
endpoints_tested.GET /api/admin/customers: PASS - Pagination, search, and is_admin=true filter work
endpoints_tested.GET /api/admin/customers/:user_id: PASS - Returns detailed customer info with subscription and stats
endpoints_tested.GET /api/admin/admins: PASS - Lists all admin users (contact@trustoffice.app found)
endpoints_tested.POST /api/admin/customers/:user_id/make-: PASS - Grants admin privileges and forever_free subscription
endpoints_tested.POST /api/admin/customers/:user_id/remov: PASS - Removes admin privileges (blocked for primary admin)
endpoints_tested.DELETE /api/admin/customers/:user_id: NOT TESTED - Would delete real user data
endpoints_tested.POST /api/admin/referrals/fix: PASS - Validates user emails before creating referrals
endpoints_tested.POST /api/admin/create-admin: PASS - Creates or promotes user to admin

security_verified.primary_admin_protection: Cannot remove admin status from contact@trustoffice.app
